question:
Will Fiorentina vs. Lecce end in a draw?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 2, 2025
If the game ends in a draw, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve to "Yes".

Resolution source: https://www.legaseriea.it/

evidences.content: Curiously, given a longstanding reputation for being poor travellers, the Giallorossi have accrued double the amount of points away from home - four so far. So, they may fancy their chance of extending Fiorentina's woes, while hauling themselves further clear of the relegation zone. evidences.title: xG stats for teams and players from the TOP European leagues
evidences.content: Expected goals (xG) is the new revolutionary football metric, which allows you to evaluate team and player performance. In a low-scoring game such as football, final match score does not provide a clear picture of performance. This is why more and more sports analytics turn to the advanced models like xG, which is a statistical measure of the quality of chances created and conceded. Our goal was to create the most precise method for shot quality evaluation. For this case, we trained neural network prediction algorithms with the large dataset (>100,000 shots, over 10 parameters for each). On this site, you will find our detailed xG statistics for the top European leagues. Select file format

evidences.title: It’s Milan–Como night! | Serie A Enilive | Lega Serie A
evidences.content: DID YOU KNOW? Double postponement in the seasonal matches between Milan and Como: Milan engaged in the League Supercup on the occasion of the first leg match, in the second leg the Meazza stadium unavailable due to the opening ceremony of the Milan-Cortina 2026 Winter Olympics. It was since the 2019/20 season that the same match had not been postponed both in the first and second leg: Brescia-Sassuolo postponed due to the death of the Neroverdi president Squinzi, the return leg in Emilia postponed due to the pandemic alarm. The rescheduled Sassuolo-Brescia, finished 3-0, played on 9 March, was the last Serie A match before the national lockdown that lasted until May. [...] COACHES AND PLAYER Luka Modric on target against Pisa: 2nd goal in Serie A for the Croatian midfielder. He had not scored since 14 September 2025 in Milan-Bologna 1-0. Loftus-Cheek on target against Pisa: 3rd goal in this championship for the English midfielder. He had not scored for 2 matches in a row since 20-27 January 2024, against Udinese and brace against Bologna. DO YOU REMEMBER THE FIRST LEG MATCH? DISCIPLINE Suspended: none Cautioned: Fofana, Athekame, Rabiot (Milan); Nico Paz, Da Cunha, Addai (Como)...

evidences.title: Pisa vs. Milan kicks off Matchday 25 | Serie A Enilive | Lega Serie A
evidences.content: COACHES and PLAYERS Massimiliano Allegri is the ex of the day: as a player, he made his Serie A debut on 11 June 1989 for Pisa against Milan (0–2, Van Basten brace). He came on for Martini in the 88th minute. Ruben Loftus-Cheek scored against Bologna: it was the English midfielder’s second league goal of the season. He had not scored since Matchday 2 (Lecce–Milan 0–2, 29 August 2025). Christopher Nkunku scored against Bologna: it was the French forward’s fifth league goal of the season. He had not scored at least five goals in a single league campaign since 2022/23 (when he scored 16 in the Bundesliga for RB Leipzig). [...] Pisa and Milan are among the teams awarded the most penalties in Serie A 2025/26 (6, level with Como and Genoa). Milan are also among the teams that have conceded the most penalties (7, level with Napoli). Milan are the only Serie A 2025/26 team unbeaten away from home: their last away defeat was the 3–1 loss at Roma’s Olimpico on 18 May 2025.
